name: Pear and Ginger Crisp
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (16-oz. each) sliced pears or pear halves in heavy syrup, drained
1/4 cup butter, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Arrange pears in a shallow 1 1/2-quart baking dish; sprinkle with crystallized ginger.
3. In a food processor bowl, combine oats, brown sugar, flour, and ground ginger.
4. With the motor running, gradually add butter and process until the mixture is crumbly.
5. Sprinkle the topping mixture evenly over the pears.
6. Bake in the center of the oven until the topping is lightly browned and crisp, about 20 to 25 minutes.
7. Serve with vanilla ice cream or frozen yogurt. Serves 6.
